title: lastrea podophylla
intro: Lastrea podophylla, also known as the Polypodium pellucidum or Polypodium podophyllum, is a species of fern that is native to various parts of the world, including Asia and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties due to the presence of lignans and other compounds. The health benefits of Lastrea podophylla include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lastrea podophylla can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
